Manage Elasticube build operations
Your Sisense instance hostname

The Sisense REST API provides programmatic access to the Sisense business intelligence platform, enabling management of dashboards, data models (Elasticubes and live models), users, groups, data security rules, and builds. The API uses Bearer token authentication obtained via the login endpoint or User Profiles settings. Endpoints follow RESTful conventions with standard HTTP methods for CRUD operations.
